daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving introspective visionary energy. The cosmos is encouraging you to sit with your thoughts today and trust the quiet moments—they're actually where your genius thrives.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner might be craving deeper conversations. Single? Someone's been noticing your mysterious energy from afar. Either way, authenticity is your superpower rn.
daily.career: That idea you've been sitting on? Today's the day to sketch it out or mention it to someone you trust. Your unconventional perspective is exactly what's needed, even if it doesn't feel mainstream.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement today—think stretching, walking, or something that feels meditative rather than intense. Mental clarity follows when you slow down.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you to lean into what makes you uniquely you instead of dimming your light for anyone. Trust the weird.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, the vibe is about deeper conversations and real connections. Don't settle for surface-level energy—ask the questions that actually matter to you.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to pitch that unconventional project or voice your perspective in meetings. Your innovative take is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—honor that by building in some grounding practices. Whether it's time outside or just sitting with your thoughts, make space for stillness.
